title: Talons of Hoth

The '''Talons of Hoth''' was a military award given to [[Rebel pilot/Legends|pilots]] of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]].

It was awarded to pilots who helped protect the Alliance during its escape to Hoth, and ensured the secrecy of their arrival by destroying all Imperial space probes in the [[Habassa]] sector, and eliminating the Star Destroyer [[Relentless (Sunaj IV)|''Relentless'']] as well as its task force of Frigates.

[[Keyan Farlander/Legends|Keyan Farlander]] received the award for his role in helping the [[Mon Calamari Star Cruiser/Legends|Mon Calamari Star Cruisers]] ''[[Yali]]'' and [[Maria (MC80 Star Cruiser)|''Maria'']] escape [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] attack on their way to the new Rebel [[Echo Base/Legends|Echo Base]] on [[Hoth/Legends|Hoth]].

==Notable recipients==
*[[Keyan Farlander/Legends|Keyan Farlander]]

*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Tour of Duty: Imperial Pursuit]]''
